coverageDisclaimer: Roof Monsters serves the full Tampa Bay region, including all of Pasco, Pinellas, Hernando, Hillsborough, and Manatee Counties — consistent with the service area published on roofmonsters.co. City pages highlight communities we visit often from our Dunedin base; county pages describe whole-county coverage.

areas.name: Dunedin, FL
areas.blurb: Roof Monsters is headquartered in Dunedin — a Gulf Coast city where salt air, summer storms, and mature neighborhoods demand roofs built for Florida conditions.
areas.localDetail: From downtown Dunedin and waterfront properties to HOA communities and commercial buildings along US-19, our crews respond quickly because this is home base — not a distant dispatch market.

areas.name: Clearwater, FL
areas.blurb: Clearwater homeowners and property managers count on Roof Monsters for shingle replacement, leak repair, and storm response across beachside and inland neighborhoods.
areas.localDetail: We routinely serve Clearwater Beach, Island Estates, Countryside, and central Clearwater — within our full Pinellas County service territory.

areas.name: St. Petersburg, FL
areas.blurb: From historic districts to newer subdivisions, St. Petersburg roofing projects need materials and ventilation strategies suited to bay humidity and hurricane season.
areas.localDetail: Roof Monsters provides installation, repair, inspections, and storm damage support throughout St. Pete as part of our complete Pinellas County coverage.

areas.name: Largo, FL
areas.blurb: Central Pinellas properties in Largo benefit from a Dunedin-based contractor who knows local permitting, common roof ages, and HOA documentation expectations.
areas.localDetail: Whether you need a full re-roof or targeted leak repair, we serve all of Largo within our Pinellas County service area.

areas.name: Palm Harbor, FL
areas.blurb: Waterfront homes, golf-course communities, and suburban neighborhoods in Palm Harbor need roofing built for Gulf-side wind and moisture exposure.
areas.localDetail: A short drive from our Dunedin headquarters, Palm Harbor remains one of our most active Pinellas markets for replacements and storm repairs.

areas.name: Seminole, FL
areas.blurb: Residential and commercial roofing for Seminole — from single-family homes to multi-unit properties along the Pinellas coast.
areas.localDetail: Seminole is within our core Pinellas service radius from Dunedin, with the same licensed crews and warranty-backed installs used county-wide.

areas.localDetail: Neighboring our Dunedin headquarters, Safety Harbor is a natural service area with fast scheduling for inspections and repair calls.

areas.name: Tampa, FL

areas.localDetail: We serve Tampa as part of our full Hillsborough County coverage — not a limited-radius patch. Contact us to confirm timing for your neighborhood.
